title: Field of Man-Sized Holes
description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, [jitter]gouged with large outlines of bodies[/jitter], stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

[sine][orange]It's perfect...[/orange][/sine]

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Normality[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

conditions: All players must have at least one card in their deck that can receive the Perfect Fit enchantment
notes:
Choosing [gold]Enter Your Hole[/gold] opens a card selection screen to pick one card from your deck to enchant with [purple]Perfect Fit[/purple].

Choosing [red]Resist[/red] lets you remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your deck, then adds the curse [red]Normality[/red] to your deck.
